creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
(In reply to Brendan Molloy from comment #1)

> Thanks for the patch. If you want to become the maintainer for this gem, 
> seeing as none of my packages depend upon it anymore (
> it's a long story, haha), I'd be happy to give it to you.

Hello Brendan. Yes, i would be fine with becoming the maintainer of the gem. Since i now have a package depending on it, haha ;)

Attached the update with also changed maintainer.

Greetings,
Torsten
